name: Casino Royale Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
3. Gradually blend flour, salt, black pepper, and nutmeg into the melted butter; cook for 1-2 minutes.
4. Slowly add milk while stirring until slightly thickened.
5. Stir in frozen vegetables until incorporated.
6. Remove from heat and stir in shredded Swiss cheese until melted.
7. Add lemon juice, cooked turkey, mushrooms, and broccoli to the mixture.
8. Pour the mixture into a lightly greased 8"x8-inch baking dish.
9. Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese on top.
10. Place biscuits over the cheese layer.
11. Bake for 20 minutes or until the biscuits are golden brown.
